scripts.build: pnpm --filter @syntropic137/default-svelte-v5 build && pnpm --filter @syntropic137/brutalist-svelte-v5 build && pnpm --filter @syntropic137/design-tokens build && vite build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @syntropic137/default-svelte-v5 build && pnpm --filter @syntropic137/brutalist-svelte-v5 build && pnpm --filter @syntropic137/design-tokens build && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
